label: Kawaii
summary: Pastel shrine: bubblegum page, tiled hearts, Comic Sans, hot-pink scalloped panels.
era: The glitter-and-hearts fanpage every 2001 diary kept, bows and all.
a11y: Every body-text pair passes WCAG AA (validated by scripts/contrast.mjs). Links on the tinted page darken to a tinted pair automatically, and stay underlined.
